label: Duty
description: Defines a pawn AI duty - the think-tree program that runs while a pawn is assigned this duty by a lord or other game system.

thinkNode.label: Think node
thinkNode.description: Root think-tree node executed while this duty is active. The Class attribute on the element selects the concrete ThinkNode subclass.

constantThinkNode.label: Constant think node
constantThinkNode.description: Optional secondary think-tree node that runs every tick regardless of the main think tree. The Class attribute on the element selects the concrete ThinkNode subclass.

alwaysShowWeapon.label: Always show weapon
alwaysShowWeapon.description: If true, the pawn's equipped weapon is always rendered while this duty is active.

hook.label: Hook
hook.description: Slot in the pawn's think-tree hierarchy where this duty's think node inserts.

socialModeMax.label: Social mode max
socialModeMax.description: Maximum social interaction level the pawn is allowed while this duty is active.

threatDisabled.label: Threat disabled
threatDisabled.description: If true, the pawn is not considered a threat while this duty is active (affects targeting logic).

ritualSpectateTarget.label: Ritual spectate target
ritualSpectateTarget.description: If true, this duty marks the pawn as a spectator target in ritual camera framing.

forceFaceUpPosture.label: Force face-up posture
forceFaceUpPosture.description: If true, the pawn is forced to render in the face-up (lying) posture while this duty is active.

drawBodyOverride.label: Draw body override
drawBodyOverride.description: Nullable bool that overrides whether the pawn's body is drawn. Absent means no override; the engine's default rendering is used.
